CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Some symbols in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Free Spins symbol.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Free Spins symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Free Spins symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a Wild symbol.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_4_Payout2_4: Reels with Wild symbols will transform all symbols in that reel into Wild symbols before wins are paid.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 4 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Free Spins symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
CryptoGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.

CryptoGoldRule.Rule1_1: Crypto Gold is a 6-reel, 6-row video slot featuring expanding Wilds-on-the-Way and free spins with increasing multiplier.
CryptoGoldRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{576} ways - %{46656} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
CryptoGoldRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
